notes: Clean, axiom-free DET-DEG capstone: builds the additive symplectic form omegaForm from the Weil pairing via discrete logarithm, proves it alternating/nondegenerate/scaling, and derives det(rho_ell psi) = deg psi. WeilScales is widely used as the standard interface by FrobMatrixData, SeparableScaling, SeparableTransportBridge, and other files. No sorries, no set_option maxHeartbeats, and no proofs exceeding 30 lines.
